title: AI Research Assistant
description:
Datadog's platform monitors infrastructure and applications for 20,000+ customers processing billions of events daily. We make monitoring intelligent and accessible.

We're seeking a AI Research Assistant to join our Cloud Monitoring team in Chicago. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Support ML engineers with data preparation and feature engineering for AI models
Run experiments and document results from AI research initiatives
Collaborate on literature reviews and implement research papers in production code
Contribute to open-source AI projects and share learnings with the team
Assist in evaluating new AI/ML frameworks and libraries
Help scale successful research projects from prototype to production

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, Physics, or related field
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years in machine learning, data science, or AI research (intern/academic preferred)
certifications: None required; relevant competitions or projects appreciated

benefits: Learning budget for courses and conferences
